All Your Questions — AnsweredAap Ke Saare Sawaal — Jawab Ke Saath

How do I make videos for Temu?Temu ke liye video kaise banayein?
The complete video creation and authorization process is covered in the tutorials linked in the Video Tutorials section below. Both steps — creating your account and making posts — are fully explained with examples. Video banane aur authorize karne ka mukammal tarika neeche Video Tutorials section mein diye gaye links mein hai. Account banana aur posts banana — dono poori tarah samjhaye gaye hain.
How many days does it take for a post to get approved?Post approve hone mein kitne din lagte hain?
A post is approved within a minimum of 7 days after submission. Once approved, your reward is credited instantly. Minimum withdrawal: $20. Post submit karne ke baad minimum 7 din mein approve ho jati hai. Approve hote hi reward foran aa jata hai. Minimum withdrawal: $20.
Where can I get fake views for my video?Fake views kahan se lagayein apni video par?
You can add views from any SMM panel. Views are not required for post approval — they are optional. Even with zero views, your post can be approved and earn the reward. Views aap kisi bhi SMM panel se laga sakte hain. Views approval ke liye zarori nahi — optional hai. Zero views ke bawajood post approve ho sakti hai.
Why does it say "Disclose" or "Ad Content" on my post?Post par "Disclose" kyun likha aata hai?
When you copy the TikTok link with Ads option enabled, you give Temu permission to run ads on your video. After approval, Temu sponsors your video.

TikTok's rule: once authorized for ads — the video cannot be deleted. This has no negative effect. "Disclose" simply means it is an authorized sponsored ad — that is a good thing. Jab aap TikTok link ko Ads option on karke authorize karte hain — Temu ko apni video par ad chalane ki permission milti hai. Approve hone ke baad Temu video sponsor karta hai.

TikTok ka rule: authorize hone ke baad woh video delete nahi ho sakti. Iska koi negative effect nahi. "Disclose" sirf yeh batata hai ke authorized ad hai — yeh acha sign hai.
How many videos can I upload per day?Din mein kitni videos upload kar sakte hain?
As many as you want — 5, 10, or more per day. No limit. More posts = more chances of approval = more earning. Jitni chaaho utni — 5, 10 ya isse bhi zyada. Koi limit nahi. Zyada posts = zyada approval = zyada earning.
What is the minimum withdrawal amount?Minimum kitne dollar nikal sakte hain?
Minimum withdrawal is $20. Withdraw via PayPal or Temu Credit once your balance reaches $20 or more. Minimum withdrawal $20 hai. Balance $20 ya zyada hone par PayPal ya Temu Credit se withdraw kar sakte hain.
How do I maximize my earnings?Earning zyada kaise karein?
Authorize with your highest-follower account. More followers = higher level = more per post. 10K → ~$5/post · 100K → ~$60/post · 1M → $100+/post.
Always use your highest-follower account — this directly sets your earning level.
 Sabse zyada followers wale account se authorize karo. Zyada followers = zyada level = zyada earning. 10K → ~$5/post · 1 lakh → ~$60/post · 10 lakh → $100+/post.
Hamesha sabse zyada followers wala account use karo — yahi earning level decide karta hai.
Is Temu trusted? Why does it pay so much?Kya Temu trusted hai? Itna zyada kyun deta hai?
100% trusted — like Amazon and Shopify. Why so much? If Temu made its own ad campaigns, it would cost millions. Instead, they pay us a few hundred dollars per post — we create and upload content to our own accounts. Their ad reaches millions of followers at a fraction of the cost. Both sides benefit. 100% trusted — Amazon aur Shopify jaisa. Itna zyada kyun? Agar Temu khud ads banaye toh lakhon lagein. Hame kuch sao dollar per post dete hain — hum apne account se unki advertising karte hain. Unki ad millions tak pahunchti hai almost free. Dono ka faida.
Can I use a Pakistani account? Monetization required?Pakistani account se kar sakte hain? Monetize hona zarori hai?
Any country works. Monetization is NOT required. Whether monetized, demonetized, or never monetized — no difference. Just need active account + 1,000+ followers. Kisi bhi mulk ka account. Monetization zarori NAHI. Monetized ho, demonetized ho, ya kabhi nahi hua — koi farq nahi. Bas active account + 1,000+ followers.
My account was not approved — why?Account approve nahi hua — kyun?
1. Followers below 1,000
2. Account not active — very low views, rarely posts
3. No videos in last 28 days

Fix: Use a genuinely active account with 1,000+ followers and recent posts. 1. Followers 1,000 se kam
2. Account inactive — bahut kam views, mahine mein ek baar post
3. 28 din mein koi video nahi

Solution: Genuinely active account use karo jis ke 1,000+ followers hon aur recent posts hon.
Account got approved — what next?Account approve ho gaya — ab kya?
Send your authorization screenshot on WhatsApp (+92 311 4989274) showing your account name and level. Once verified, you will be added to our private group where we provide:

✅ Daily posts and videos to upload
✅ Guidance on which videos to pick and upload
✅ Daily updates and support — all free WhatsApp par authorization screenshot bhejo (+92 311 4989274) jis mein account name aur level show ho. Verify hone ke baad private group mein add kar diya jayega jahan:

✅ Daily posts aur videos provide karenge
✅ Kaunsi videos upload karni hain — sab batayenge
✅ Daily updates aur support — bilkul free

Full Level & Earning BreakdownPoora Level aur Earning Breakdown

● How Levels Work● Level System Kaise Kaam Karta Hai

Higher followers = Higher level = More earning per post. Zyada followers = Zyada level = Har post par zyada earning.

Your Temu level is determined by your authorized account's follower count. Views do not matter — only post approval counts. The higher your level, the more you earn per approved post.

Aap ka Temu level authorize kiye gaye account ke followers par depend karta hai. Views matter nahi karte — sirf post approval counts. Level jitna zyada, earning utni zyada.
